metadata.name: SuperTeam
metadata.description: Seven-stage delivery plugin with main-session-as-orchestrator architecture and hook-enforced trust chain

plugins.name: superteam
plugins.description: V4.7 PLAN Tier A close-out. V4.7.3 closes the last two trust-chain holes: (A2) PreToolUse gate_stage_advance blocks current-run.json edits that bump current_stage past spawn-log/artifact preconditions; (A3) PostToolUse validator_frontmatter checks every specialist artifact (review.md/verify.md/polish.md/final.md/etc.) for an agent_type+agent_id+task_slug frontmatter that matches spawn-log.jsonl, auto-stamping when absent and logging gate-violations on forgery. Together with V4.7.0/V4.7.1/V4.7.2, the three rationalization-bypass routes — self-stop, stage-skip, artifact-forge — are all hook-blocked. AI self-discipline is compressed to genuinely-semantic decisions only.
